message: Node started: Identify the standard MOND interpolation function mu(x) used in Modified Newtonian Dynamics, where x is the ratio of acceleration to the MOND acceleration scale a0. Determine if the ratio of temperatures derived in the previous step matches the functional form of a common MOND interpolation function (such as the simple, standard, or deep-MOND interpolations) or if it relates to the inverse of the interpolation function.
